channel.title: 论文笔记 on M2kar - Security World
channel.description: Recent content in 论文笔记 on M2kar - Security World

item.title: 【论文笔记】CyGraph:用知识图谱发现并可视化网络流量中的安全威胁
item.description: 标题: CyGraph: Graph-Based Analytics and Visualization for Cybersecurity 作者: S. Noel1, E. Harley, K.H. Tam, M. Limiero and M. Share 关键字: 流量分析, 知识图谱 来源: The MITRE Corporation, McLean, VA, United States 链接: http://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0169716116300426 引用: Noel, S., E. Harley, K. H. Tam, M. Limiero, and M. Share. “CyG

item.title: 【论文笔记】HALucinator 虚拟化硬件层模拟启动固件
item.description: 标题:HALucinator: Firmware Re-hosting Through Abstraction Layer Emulation 作者: Abraham A Clements, Eric Gustafson; Tobias Scharnowski; Paul Grosen; David Fritz; Christopher Kruegel and Giovanni Vigna; Saurabh Bagchi; Mathias Payer 来源: USENIX Security 2020 链接: https://www.usenix.org/conference/usenixsecurity20/presentation/clements 引用: Clements, A. A., Gustafson, E., Scharnowski, T., Grosen, P., Fritz, D., Kruegel, C.,

item.title: 【论文笔记】Beyond credential stuffing: Password similarity models using neural networks
item.description: 论文主题 同一用户在不同网站的密码相似度模型。 摘要 英文 Attackers increasingly use passwords leaked from one website to compromise associated accounts on other websites. Such targeted attacks work because users reuse, or pick similar, passwords for different websites. We recast one of the core technical challenges underlying targeted attacks as the task of

item.title: 【论文笔记】Birthday, Name and Bifacial-security Understanding Passwords of Chinese Web Users
item.description: 论文主题 对中文密码进行实证分析，发现中文密码中有趣的结构和特征，揭示了中文密码的双相安全性（Bifacial-security）。 摘要 英文 Much

item.title: 【论文笔记】GENPass: A general deep learning model for password guessing with PCFG rules and adversarial generation
item.description: 论文主题 使用RCFG+LSTM和对抗生成网络猜解密码。 摘要 英文 Password has become today’s dominant method of authentication in social network. While the brute-force attack methods, such as HashCat and John the Ripper, are unpractical, the research then switches to the password guess. The state-of-the-art approaches, such as Markov

item.title: 【论文笔记】PassGAN: A Deep Learning Approach for Password Guessing
item.description: 论文主题 使用对抗神经网络的方式进行密码生成和密码猜解。 摘要 中文 最先进的密码猜测工具，例如HashCat和Ripper John，使用户能够每秒

item.title: 【论文笔记】SoK: Security Evaluation of Home-Based IoT Deployments
item.description: 概览 摘要 Home-based IoT devices have a bleak reputation regarding their security practices. On the surface, the insecurities of IoT devices seem to be caused by integration problems that may be addressed by simple measures, but this work finds that to be a naive assumption. The truth is, IoT deployments, at their core, utilize traditional compute systems, such as embedded, mobile, and network. These components have many unexplored

item.title: 【论文笔记】SafeHidden: An Efficient and Secure Information Hiding Technique Using Re-randomization
item.description: SafeHidden: An Efficient and Secure Information 概览 摘要 中文（翻译） 在众多代码重用攻击的防御手段中，信息隐藏(Information Hiding,IH)由于其有效性和高性能，成
